applicant_organization.address: 4821 Maple Ridge Drive, Suite 210, Madison, WI 53711

products_and_sales_details.description_of_products_and_means_of_sal: Door-to-door informational visits offering residential rooftop solar panel systems, energy storage batteries, and related installation services, with follow-up sales appointments scheduled at the homeowner’s convenience.

Representatives will not collect payment at the door; instead, they will provide written estimates, explain available financing options and tax incentives, and, if requested, assist homeowners in completing online applications using a company-issued tablet.

All sales activities will occur between 10:00 AM and 7:00 PM on weekdays and 10:00 AM and 5:00 PM on Saturdays, with no activity on Sundays or major holidays; representatives will wear visible company ID badges and high-visibility vests and will immediately leave any property upon request.
